title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement link
scenario: Onboarding EULA page License Agreement link directs user to latest HP Software License Agreement page
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or after clearing app data).
2. On the Welcome / Onboarding screen, proceed to the EULA (End User License Agreement) page.
3. Locate and tap the 'License Agreement' link displayed on the EULA page.
4. Observe the browser or in-app web view that opens.
expected: The user is directed to the latest HP Software License Agreement page at https://www.hp.com/go/sweula.
